path: PNGS/Aqa Muhammad ﷺ/Ali having Ihram with niyah of aligning with Aqa ﷺ.png
text: (Sahih aFBukhari - Hajj (Pilgrimage) - z=1) << VAl came to the Prophet (p.b.u.h) from Yemen (to Mecca). The Prophet asked VAR, "With what intention have you assumed lhram?" "Ali replied, 'l have assumed Ihram with the same intention as that of the Prophet.* The Prophet said, “If 1 had not the Hadi with me | would have finished the Ihram_* Muhammad bin Bakr narrated extra from Ibn Juraij, *The Prophet said to JAl. "With what intention have you assumed the lhram, O TAi?" He replied, "With the same (intention) as that of the Prophet " The Prophet said, "Have a Hadi and keep your lhram as it is." Reference : Sahih al-Bukhari 1558
